name: Shrimp Provolone Toastettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein shrimp, slicing them in half lengthwise. Place shrimp in a shallow bowl with lemon juice, minced garlic, salt, and pepper; set aside.
2. Slice French bread into 1/4 inch rounds and reserve. Grate provolone cheese and set aside.
3. To make garlic butter: Roast garlic cloves at 350°F for 15-20 minutes. Combine roasted garlic, softened butter, chopped parsley, and basil in a food processor; process until fully incorporated.
4. Spread the garlic butter on both sides of each French bread slice. Place the slices on a well-greased cookie sheet.
5. When ready to serve, lightly toast under the broiler on both sides until golden brown.
6. Place 1 piece of shrimp on each slice of toasted bread; sprinkle with cheese. Return under the broiler until cheese melts and shrimp is cooked through. Serve warm.
